events.name: Geospatial Visualisation with Python, Web Scraping, and Folium
events.description:
Meetup group: PyData Milton Keynes

How can web data be transformed into interactive maps that reveal real-world patterns and connections?

In this talk, Hugh will walk through a project that uses Python to collect data from the web, process location information, and build interactive geographic visualisations with Folium. The session will introduce the technical workflow behind web scraping, geocoding, and map creation, showing how these tools can be combined to turn raw data into clear and eng

events.name: Phil Whittaker - CLI vs MCP vs Agent Skills
events.address: No. 2 Circle Square, 1 Symphony Park, M1 7FS, 5th Floor, Manchester, 18, Manchester
events.description:
Meetup group: Practically AI: Applied AI for Software Engineers Manchester

Agent tooling has become one of the most argued about areas of AI.

In the space of a few months, we’ve gone from “MCP is the standard” to a growing backlash, CLI-based approaches, and the introduction of Agent Skills — all claiming to be the right way to give agents capabilities.

**So which one actually matters?**

**This talk breaks down what’s really going on beneath the noise.**

events.name: The 12 Principles of Masculine Discipline — Weekly Session
events.description:
Meetup group: The 12 Principles of Masculine Discipline

This is a weekly session focused on one thing — developing discipline as a foundation for a better life.
Each week, we explore one of the **12 Principles of Masculine Discipline** and apply it in a simple, practical way. The aim is not perfection — it’s progress. Small, consistent steps that improve your wellbeing, your relationships, and your direction in life.
